A programmer puts two glasses on his bedside table before going to sleep. A full one, in case he gets thirsty, and an empty one, in case he doesn’t.
Why did the functions stop calling each other? Because they had constant arguments.
Which song would an exception sing? Can't catch me - Avicii
How do you comfort a designer? You give them some space... between the elements.
A user interface is like a joke. If you have to explain it then it is not that good.
Why do programmers prefer dark chocolate? Because it's bitter like their code.
What's the best part about TCP jokes? I get to keep telling them until you get them.
The punchline often arrives before the set-up. Do you know the problem with UDP jokes?
Why do programmers always get Christmas and Halloween mixed up? Because DEC 25 = OCT 31
A SQL query walks into a bar, walks up to two tables and asks... 'Can I join you?'
Want to hear a joke about construction? Nah, I'm still working on it.
What kind of music do welders like? Heavy metal.
Why was the developer always calm? Because they knew how to handle exceptions.
How did the hipster burn the roof of his mouth? He ate the pizza before it was cool.
What do you give a sick lemon? Lemonaid.
What do you call someone with no nose? Nobody knows.
Which side of the chicken has more feathers? The outside.
Why did the tree go to the dentist? It needed a root canal.
What are the strongest days of the week? Saturday and Sunday...the rest are weekdays.
How do you steal a coat? You jacket.

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 Hatch. 
 Hatch who? Bless you!

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 Opportunity. That is impossible. Opportunity doesn’t come knocking twice!

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 Cows go. 
 Cows go who? No, cows go moo.

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 A broken pencil. 
 A broken pencil who? Never mind. It's pointless.

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 Little old lady. 
 Little old lady who? I didn't know you could yodel!
